generated_from: Codex Coding OS authoring environment on 2026-06-05
policy: Plugin-managed skills, connectors, and MCP servers are installed through Codex so authentication, updates, permissions, and provenance remain controlled by the plugin system.

repo_bundled_policy.reason: License permission alone is not enough. Plugin-managed skills can depend on account permissions, connector authentication, plugin updates, and Codex-managed provenance.
